monk_huangjue.name: Abbot Dao Yan
dialogues: Welcome to Huangjue Temple, young one.
In times of famine, even the temple cannot feed all.
I see great destiny in your eyes. Go forth and change this world.
Remember: a river may flow far, but it never forgets its source.
When you are lost, return here. The Buddha will guide you.

farmer_zhongli.name: Old Farmer Wang
dialogues: Another year of drought... the crops wither before harvest.
The tax collectors took everything again. We have nothing left.
You were once like us, Zhu Yuanzhang. Do not forget your roots.
If you lead the people, we will follow. We trust you.
The land cries out for a ruler who understands suffering.

merchant_dingyuan.name: Merchant Li
dialogues: Ah, a traveler! I have goods from all across the land.
The roads are dangerous these days. Bandits everywhere.
I hear the Red Turban Army is gathering strength in the south.
If you need supplies, my shop is always open. Fair prices!
Between you and me, the Yuan Dynasty will not last much longer.

scholar_jinhua.name: Scholar Song Lian
dialogues: Knowledge is the foundation of any great kingdom.
I have read the classics since I was a boy. The way of kings is clear.
You seek to unite the realm? You will need wise counsel.
A ruler without scholars is like a ship without a compass.
When you build your dynasty, call upon me. I shall serve.

general_poyang.name: General Xu Da
dialogues: The Battle of Poyang Lake will decide the fate of the realm!
Chen Youliang's fleet outnumbers us, but our spirit is stronger.
I pledge my sword to you, my lord. Together we are invincible.
Fire ships! That is how we shall defeat his massive fleet!
Victory! The lake runs red, but our cause prevails!

beggar_yingtian.name: Old Beggar Zhao
dialogues: Spare a coin, kind sir? I have not eaten in three days.
I was once a wealthy man... before the wars took everything.
You have the look of one who has known hunger. I can tell.
The streets of Yingtian are full of broken dreams.
May the heavens bless you. You are different from the others.

herbalist_sichuan.name: Herbalist Liu
dialogues: The mountains of Sichuan hold cures for many ailments.
This ginseng root will restore your vitality. Take it freely.
I have lived in these mountains for forty years. Nature provides.
War brings wounds. I am here to heal them, one herb at a time.
Remember: the body is a temple. Treat it well, warrior.

child_hangzhou.name: Little Ming
dialogues: Mister! Are you a real hero? My mama says heroes save people!
Can you teach me to use a sword? I want to be strong like you!
The bad soldiers burned our village. Will you stop them?
When I grow up, I want to be just like you, sir!
Here, take this flower! It's for good luck on your journey!

merchant_guangzhou.name: Sea Merchant Chen
dialogues: Welcome to Guangzhou! Port of a thousand ships!
I trade with lands beyond the sea - spices, silk, and jade.
The Yuan officials tax us merchants to death. It must end.
When you rule, will you open the ports to free trade again?
My ships are yours, my lord. The sea connects all lands.

farmer_beijing.name: Northern Farmer Zhang
dialogues: The northern winds are harsh, but the soil is fertile.
We heard rumors of a great leader rising in the south. Is it you?
The Mongol soldiers oppress us daily. We pray for liberation.
If you march north, every farmer here will join your army.
The north has waited too long for a true son of Han to rule.
